---
title: "The Team"
format: html
---

## {{< fa users >}} About Us

We developed this project for **ISSS608** (Visual Analytics and Applications) during Term 3 of the Academic Year 2025-26 in [Singapore Management University](https://www.smu.edu.sg/) under the guidance of [Dr. Kam Tin Seong](https://faculty.smu.edu.sg/profile/kam-tin-seong-486), Associate Professor of Information Systems.

## {{< fa id-card >}} Team Members

### {{< fa user >}} Ang Ming Kwan

**Role:** Data Preparation & EDA\
Brief bio or role description.

### {{< fa user >}} Persie Evangeline

**Role:** Visualisation & Shiny App\
Brief bio or role description.

### {{< fa user >}} Yap Jit Wei

**Role:** Findings & Report Writing\
Brief bio or role description.
